label: HERE Maps
description: Access HERE's enterprise mapping, geocoding, and routing APIs using an API key from the HERE developer portal.

form.title: Connect HERE Maps
form.subtitle: Paste your HERE REST API key to enable geocoding, routing, and mapping services.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a REST API key from the HERE Developer Portal. No OAuth setup required — copy and paste in under a minute.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a HERE REST API Key

1. Sign in at [developer.here.com](https://developer.here.com/).
2. Click your account avatar (top right) → **Projects**, or navigate directly to the [Projects page](https://platform.here.com/admin/apps).
3. Select an existing project or click **New Project** to create one.
4. Inside the project, go to the **REST** section and click **Create API key**.
5. Give the key a name (e.g. `Anton`) and click **Create**.
6. Copy the generated key — it is shown immediately in the key list.
7. Paste it into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Keys can be revoked at any time from the same Projects → REST page.
- HERE's free tier includes a generous monthly allowance; check **Usage & Billing** in the portal to monitor consumption.
- If you need to restrict the key by service (e.g. only Geocoding), use the **Restrictions** settings on the key detail page before saving.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at developer.here.com → Projects → REST → Create API key.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL Override
fields.description: Optional. Override the default HERE API endpoint, e.g. for private deployments or a specific regional endpoint.

methods.label: OAuth 2.0 (Client Credentials)
methods.description: Use a HERE OAuth app's client ID and secret for server-to-server access. More suitable for production environments where short-lived tokens are preferred over long-lived API keys.
methods.how_to:
## Set up HERE OAuth 2.0 (Client Credentials)

1. Sign in at [developer.here.com](https://developer.here.com/).
2. Navigate to **Projects** → select or create a project.
3. Go to the **OAuth 2.0** tab and click **Create app**.
4. Give the app a name (e.g. `Anton`) and click **Register**.
5. Copy the **Access Key ID** (this is your Client ID) and **Access Key Secret** (this is your Client Secret).
6. Paste them into the fields below.

## Notes

- Tokens issued via the client credentials grant are short-lived (typically 24 hours). Anton will refresh them automatically before expiry.
- The OAuth 2.0 token URL for HERE is `https://account.api.here.com/oauth2/token`.
- Scopes are not user-configurable for HERE's OAuth client credentials flow; HERE grants access based on the services enabled in your project.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Access Key ID (Client ID)
fields.description: Found in the HERE Developer Portal under Projects → OAuth 2.0 → your app.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Access Key Secret (Client Secret)
fields.description: Paired with the Access Key ID. Shown once at app creation — generate a new one if lost.
